rationale: Section 45.0021 restricts school districts from levying maintenance taxes to create surplus for debt service. Increasing the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not directly conflict with this restriction; it affects taxable value, not the levy-for-surplus prohibition.
quote: A school district may not levy the district's maintenance taxes described by Section 45.002 at a rate intended to create a surplus in maintenance tax revenue for the purpose of paying the district's debt service.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase may indirectly affect district revenue calculations but does not require amendment to this section.
